name: @squoosh-kit/vite-plugin
description: Vite plugin for Squoosh-Kit - handles asset copying and WASM configuration
author: Bartosz Nowak <bnowak008@gmail.com>

scripts.build: bunx tsc -p . && bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir dist --format esm --target bun --external vite && bun build ./src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.cjs --format cjs --target bun --external vite && printf 'export default function squooshVitePlugin(squooshKitRoot: string): { name: string };\n' > dist/index.d.ts
